title: Intent/Certificate spec
description: The desired-state payload for a certificate Intent (charter §2.4, ADR-0030). issuer is a ref to the CLM Connector's role; renewBefore is the Baseline-side expiry-threshold window; exportable is `false` AS SCHEMA, not a policy memo (§2.4). Typed at the seam per §1.1.

renewBefore.description: renew when notAfter is within this window, e.g. 360h

onRemoveRevoke.description: when true and the Intent is withdrawn with onRemove: remove, revoke rather than let-expire
